query:
SELECT id, table_name, object_id, operation, user_name, changed_fields, createdAt FROM audit_log ORDER BY createdAt DESC LIMIT 10;
SELECT id, name, token, createdAt FROM public_map_tokens ORDER BY createdAt DESC LIMIT 5;
